title: Vic's point blank - WW2 pack
description: Adds simple styled WW2 guns to point blank
body:
# This pack is no longer under development

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/u8ndt7XsnMg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>









This pack add's weapons from ww2 to pointblank. My goal with this pack is too create weapons for most of the nations that fought in ww2. If you have any suggestions on what weapons i should do next feel free to leave them in the comments.



### 
### 
### Requirements
- Vic's point blank
- Geckolib
 



### How to install

1. Install vic's point blank 

2. In your Minecraft directory create a folder called "pointblank" 

3. Place the content pack zip folder into the folder you created




### Weapons as of v1.2
- Smle mkIII
- Sten gun
- m1a1 thompson
- m3 grease gun
- Browning automatic rifle
- mp40
- stg44
- dp28
- Bren gun
- ppsh41
- Type 100
- Mas38
- M1 carbine
- De lisle carbine




### 
### Planned upcoming Weapons/Updates (Subject to change)
- more german weapons
- more British weapons
- more american weapons
- more soviet weapons
- Historically accurate attachments (no red dot sights)
- Weapon audio overhaul
